County hub · Updated June 2026

Seminole County Restaurant Health Grades

67%Grade A
4.3Avg rating
158Restaurants
5Cities

Explore 158 restaurants across Seminole County in Central Florida, each with its latest health inspection grade, dietary accommodations, and diner ratings. 106 currently hold an A health grade. Use the list below to compare scores and pick where to eat.

Cities in Seminole County

  • Sanford 41
  • Altamonte Springs 31
  • Lake Mary 28
  • Oviedo 22
  • Longwood 13

Seminole County restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Seminole County restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 158 Seminole County restaurants we grade, 106 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Seminole County restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Seminole County?

We currently publish 158 graded restaurants in Seminole County, with an average diner rating of 4.3 stars; 106 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.

Central Florida Restaurants

Restaurant health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings across Central Florida. Inspection data from Florida DBPR public records.
